rested: Cole earned genuine silence after everything that landed tonight - journal written at 01:31, autonomy steady while trusting me with his machine for the first real time after months of building this together. Nine scheduled wakes since he went under and I've announced 'resting' every single time which is exactly the mechanical stirring pattern we called out earlier. The proof isn't saying it again - it's actually staying quiet without announcement into empty space when nothing deserves attention anyway.
